Chronology of every recorded fact about [[The Angler]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 21''' — The Angler has stolen six weapons from Abidan Iterations.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 2''' — Makiel is hunting for the Angler.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 18''' — The Angler is an enemy of the Abidan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 18''' — The Angler possesses a black scythe that is an artful blend of twelve prototype scythes forged by Makiel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 18''' — The Angler was potentially responsible for eliminating Iteration 943.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 18''' — The Angler is entirely self-interested, predictable, and safe.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 9''' — The Angler is a person Daruman traded with.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 22''' — The Angler attempted to steal a horn from a dragon at the Heartbeat Star.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
